children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The United States Governor of the Fund may contribute on behalf of the United States an amount equal to the amount appropriated under subsection (b), pursuant to the resolution of the Fund entitled “The Ninth General Replenishment of Resources of the African Development Fund”.

children.heading: Subject to appropriations
children.label: 2 Subject to appropriations
children.text: Any commitment to make the contribution authorized by paragraph (1) shall be effective only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriations Acts.

children.heading: Limitations on authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Limitations on authorization of appropriations
children.text: For the contribution authorized by subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury, without fiscal year limitation.
